title: sida bortolanensis
intro: Sida bortolanensis, also known as Bortolan's mallow or Bortolan's sida, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sida bortolanensis include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and the relief of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Sida bortolanensis can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
